mapper.sql: id, process_instance_id, business_key, applicant, dept_manager, general_manager, status, start_date, end_date, days, reason, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: select from leave_application where applicant = #{applicant} order by created_at desc, id desc
select from leave_application order by created_at desc, id desc
mapper.update: update leave_application set process_instance_id = #{processInstanceId}, business_key = #{businessKey}, applicant = #{applicant}, dept_manager = #{deptManager}, general_manager = #{generalManager}, status = #{status}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, days = #{days}, reason = #{reason}, created_at = #{createdAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}
